set(_HQC_OBJS "")

if(OQS_ENABLE_KEM_hqc_1)
    add_library(hqc_1_ref OBJECT kem_hqc_1.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/code.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/crypto_memset.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/fft.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/gf.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/gf2x.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/hqc.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/kem.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/parsing.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/reed_muller.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/reed_solomon.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/symmetric.c xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref/vector.c)
    target_compile_options(hqc_1_ref PUBLIC -DHQC_ARCH_REF=1 -DPQCHQC_NAMESPACE_PREFIX=PQCHQC_HQC1_C_ -DUSE_OQS_RANDOMBYTES)
    target_include_directories(hqc_1_ref PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/xuganyu96-pqc-hqc_hqc-1_ref)
    target_include_directories(hqc_1_ref PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/common/pqclean_shims)
    target_compile_options(hqc_1_ref PUBLIC -DHQC_ARCH_REF=1 -DPQCHQC_NAMESPACE_PREFIX=PQCHQC_HQC1_C_ -DUSE_OQS_RANDOMBYTES)
    set(_HQC_OBJS ${_HQC_OBJS} $<TARGET_OBJECTS:hqc_1_ref>)
endif()
